requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety, EHS Assessment, and Incident Reporting
requirement_topic.zh: 消防安全、EHS评估和事故报告
requirement_topic.zht: 消防安全、EHS評估和事故報告

summary.en: EPRA states that it executes EHS assessment of proposed projects and audits existing energy facilities, including assessment of hazards, emergency preparedness, accidents, fires, explosions, and incident investigations. For Kenya BESS projects, fire and EHS evidence may therefore be reviewed through EPRA licensing / audits, local county fire processes, environmental review, insurer requirements, project-owner specifications, and emergency-response planning.
summary.zh: EPRA说明其对拟建项目开展EHS评估，并审计现有能源设施，包括危害、应急准备、事故、火灾、爆炸和事故调查。对于肯尼亚BESS项目，消防和EHS证据可能通过EPRA许可/审计、地方县级消防流程、环境审查、保险方要求、项目业主规范和应急响应计划进行审查。
summary.zht: EPRA說明其對擬建項目開展EHS評估，並審計現有能源設施，包括危害、應急準備、事故、火災、爆炸和事故調查。對於肯亞BESS項目，消防和EHS證據可能透過EPRA許可／審計、地方郡級消防流程、環境審查、保險方要求、項目業主規範和應急響應計畫進行審查。

standards_or_laws: EPRA Environmental Health & Safety assessment / audit expectations
Energy Act, 2019 incident notification expectations as administered by EPRA
County fire, environmental, insurer, and project-owner requirements where applicable

summary.en: China-side BESS fire documentation may include GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, thermal-runaway tests, fire-suppression design, container layout, emergency shutdown logic, and commissioning records. These are useful inputs but do not replace Kenya-side project, EHS, county, insurer, or authority review.
summary.zh: 中国侧BESS消防文件可能包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、热失控测试、灭火设计、集装箱布置、紧急停机逻辑和调试记录。这些是有用输入，但不能替代肯尼亚侧项目、EHS、县级、保险方或主管机关审查。
summary.zht: 中國側BESS消防文件可能包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、熱失控測試、滅火設計、集裝箱布置、緊急停機邏輯和調試記錄。這些是有用輸入，但不能替代肯亞側項目、EHS、郡級、保險方或主管機關審查。

gap.en: Prepare an English fire / EHS package with battery chemistry, enclosure layout, separation distances, ventilation, gas detection where relevant, fire detection and suppression, thermal-runaway mitigation, emergency shutdown, firefighting water / runoff assumptions, training, emergency contacts, and incident-notification procedure.
gap.zh: 应准备英文消防/EHS资料包，涵盖电池化学体系、箱体布置、防火间距、通风、适用时的气体探测、火灾探测和灭火、热失控缓解、紧急停机、消防用水/径流假设、培训、紧急联系人和事故通知程序。
gap.zht: 應準備英文消防／EHS資料包，涵蓋電池化學體系、箱體布置、防火間距、通風、適用時的氣體探測、火災探測和滅火、熱失控緩解、緊急停機、消防用水／徑流假設、培訓、緊急聯絡人和事故通知程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where EPRA licensing / EHS assessment, county fire approval, environmental approval, insurer review, or project contract applies; requirements are project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on China project approval, local fire review, and contract requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Kenya BESS fire / EHS file should be scoped at project level; battery test reports alone are not enough for installation, emergency-response, and incident-reporting expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚BESS消防/EHS文件应按项目级范围确定；电池测试报告本身不足以覆盖安装、应急响应和事故报告要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞BESS消防／EHS文件應按項目級範圍確定；電池測試報告本身不足以覆蓋安裝、應急響應和事故報告要求。
